title: Cleaner & Better Bedrock
description: Ever feel like bedrock is to pale? If so get this pack to make it darker
body:
**Tired of the default bedrock texture?**

---
This pack provides a consistent and **cleaner** grey tone, enhancing your builds and the overall aesthetic.
